data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: Apple's website architecture is designed to be fully responsive, ensuring optimal viewing across various devices.
data.technical_spec: CSS3 media queries, flexible grid layouts, and fluid images.

data.title: Single Page Application Elements
data.description: Utilizes SPA techniques for a smoother user experience with minimal page reloads.
data.technical_spec: JavaScript frameworks like React or Vue may be utilized.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: The site employs a CDN to enhance page load speeds and global content delivery.
data.technical_spec: Use of Akamai or another major CDN provider.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Microservices support scalability and independent deployment of site features.
data.technical_spec: RESTful services or GraphQL APIs might be involved.

data.title: SEO Optimization
data.description: Architecture includes optimized meta tags, structured data, and fast loading times.
data.technical_spec: Use of schema.org markup and lazy loading.
